title: Better Fireflies
description: Improved firefly texture for Minecraft 1.21.8+. Enhance atmosphere and visuals.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cac4d1727181f437e4ff547d1db2b4c8e046f4d2.png)

This pack redesigns the fireflies from Snapshot 25w05a, improving their appearance.

# Preview ![Before and After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6412b4c8f7c358cdcb6ccbaab36ce028c8692ce.jpeg)
